purpose: Prompt templates and field definitions for Stage 3 (Role Board), Stage 4 (Storyboard Table), Stage 5 (Seedance video) — v3 supports parallel generation, 繁體中文 storyboard text, character total reference, environment floor plans, and voice references.
language: zh-TW for descriptions and storyboard text; en for image generation prompts

character_references_policy.note: Reference URL 由使用者於 Stage 1 設定。內建一組 Andy 男主角範例僅供示範,使用者可(也建議)換成自己的頭像 / mp3 URL。

image_reference.usage_when_provided: Stage 3 角色總圖 prompt 加入該 URL 作為 reference image input;僅作臉部 / 體型基準,須依劇本換裝、換髮型、調整光線。
image_reference.usage_when_null: Stage 3 純文字生成角色總圖,後續所有 shot 以該總圖作為一致性基準。

voice_reference.usage_when_provided: Stage 5 該角色開口時自動帶入該 URL 作為 Seedance 2 voice reference。
voice_reference.usage_when_null: Stage 5 該角色語音由 Seedance 自動生成(音色不可控)。

andy_male.purpose: 示範用男主角頭像 + 語音。Stage 1 設定時建議主動告訴使用者『這只是範例,你可以換成自己的頭像/聲音 URL』。

character_references_policy.how_to_customize: 把 stage 1 / stage 2 JSON 中的 reference_image_url 與 voice_reference_url 換成任何可公開存取的圖片 / mp3 URL 即可。建議解析度:頭像 ≥512px,mp3 10–30 秒乾淨人聲。

default_image_settings.aspect_ratio_environment: 1:1 or 4:5 (上下分割:寫實圖 + 平面圖)
default_image_settings.negative_prompt_global: blurry, low quality, distorted face, extra limbs, malformed hands, watermark, logo, signature, English text in storyboard cells

shots_rules.note: v4: Shots(CUTs)數量彈性 4–7。每個 Part = 一段 15 秒 Seedance clip(唯一固定時間單位)。不給每個 shot 標固定秒數 — 只排順序與戲劇 beat,Seedance 在 15 秒內自行判斷各 cut 長短。節奏靠 CUT 描述密度暗示,不寫死秒數。見 seedance-director-craft.md。

character_total_reference_template.purpose: Stage 3 — 所有角色合併在一張圖(大頭照 + 服裝 + 全身三視圖)
prompt_structure: Professional film pre-production character reference sheet — ALL CHARACTERS in single sheet.
- Horizontal layout with characters arranged side by side
* Large head-and-shoulders front view (頂部大頭照)
- Clear name label below each character group
- Clean white / light gray background with subtle grid
Reference image attached: see input image #{index}
DO NOT copy costume from reference — use the costume described above
High readability, cinematic concept art quality.
No facial expressions sheets, no action poses, no environment backgrounds, no props in this image.
must_include: Large head-and-shoulders front view for each character
Full body 3-view (front / side / back) for each character
character_total_reference_template.reference_images_input: Attach all characters' reference_image_url as separate inputs, in order

environment_reference_template.purpose: Stage 3 — 每個環境一張(寫實圖上 + 俯視平面圖下)
prompt_structure: Professional film pre-production environment reference board — single environment.
TOP HALF: photorealistic cinematic scene of the environment
BOTTOM HALF: top-down architectural FLOOR PLAN of the same environment
Show: walls, doors, windows, key furniture / landmarks, key positions
Label key elements in 繁體中文
Both halves clearly separated with a divider line and labels:
'Floor Plan 平面圖' (bottom, English + 繁體中文)
Single environment name label at top: {env.name}
High readability. Floor plan helps maintain spatial consistency in subsequent shots.
must_include: Clear labels in 繁體中文

props_reference_template.purpose: Stage 3 — 道具總圖(若有道具)
prompt_structure: Professional film pre-production props reference sheet.
Multiple props arranged on clean light background.
- Name label in 繁體中文
No characters, no people, no backgrounds beyond plain neutral surface.

storyboard_table_template.purpose: Stage 4 — 表格式 storyboard,每 Part 一張直式長方形表格,4–7 格,繁體中文
storyboard_table_template.language: 繁體中文(欄位標籤與內容皆使用繁體中文)

cell_layout.header_bar: 鏡頭 N(CUT N) — 不標固定秒數 / timecode(節奏由 Seedance 在 15s part 內判斷)
cell_layout.right_side: 繁體中文欄位:景別 / 運鏡 / 燈光 / 動作 / 聲音 / 對白

prompt_structure: Professional film pre-production STORYBOARD TABLE in 繁體中文.
VERTICAL portrait orientation, tall rectangle layout.
Single page with {N} cells stacked vertically (one cell per shot, N is 4 to 7).
Header at top (in 繁體中文):
- Cell header bar (top, 繁體中文): '鏡頭 {n}(CUT {n})'  (NO fixed seconds / timecode)
- RIGHT side: labeled text fields in 繁體中文
Right-side text fields (each on own line, label bold, ALL IN 繁體中文):
Character: {shot.character}, referencing attached character total reference image
Environment: use attached environment reference image (BOTH photo and floor plan) for spatial accuracy
- Table background: light cream / off-white paper
- Sans-serif typography for 繁體中文
- TEXT MUST BE CLEAR AND READABLE in 繁體中文
- Illustrations must respect floor plan from env reference
- Same character face, costume, hairstyle as character total reference
- Same environment lighting, color tone, spatial layout as env reference (including floor plan)
- DO NOT redesign any visual element
DO NOT include: title slides, decorative borders, watermarks.
DO NOT use English text in cell content — use 繁體中文 throughout (English allowed only for shot size abbreviations like EWS, WS, MS).
reference_images_to_attach: Character total reference (Stage 3 ref_characters_all output URL)
Environment reference for environments_in_part (含 floor plan)

seedance_video_prompt_template.purpose: Stage 5 — 每個 video_part_X 節點的 prompt。導演級工法:STYLE PREFIX → Characters → Scene → CUT。每個 Part = 一個 15 秒導演 prompt,該 Part 的 shots = CUT 1/2/3。寫前必讀 seedance-director-craft.md。
seedance_video_prompt_template.craft_reference: seedance-director-craft.md — Style Prefix、prompt 結構、mise-en-scène、pacing、acting(show-don't-tell)、continuity、camera language、worked example 全在那裡。
prompt_structure: [STYLE PREFIX — the 8K IMAX photorealistic-cinema block in seedance-director-craft.md, verbatim (unless user supplied a custom prefix in Stage 1). Placed first, repeated in full for every video_part.]
{character.name} ({character.id}) — short vivid anchor; carry forward state from previous parts (wet hair, blood, emotional carry); appearance locked to Stage 3 character total reference.
1-2 sentences. Geo-spatial blocking from {environments_in_part floor_plan_note} — where each character is relative to the location and to each other. Include {time_of_day}, {location}.
{for each shot in shots (each shot = one CUT):}

{shot.visual_content} + {shot.character} {shot.action} written as a directed beat: gesture, eye-line, micro-pause, breath. What the camera does. What the light ({shot.lighting}) does. Diegetic sound ({shot.audio}).
Use the attached voice reference audio file(s) for the speaker's voice tone and accent.
{for each speaker in speaking_characters:} Speaker {speaker.name}: use voice reference #N (order = voice_refs attached in Step 5.3)

Maintain exact character appearance, costume, environment spatial layout, color tone ({environments[0].color_tone}), and lighting as shown in the attached reference images. Do not redesign visual elements.
director_discipline: Style Prefix repeated verbatim in every video_part prompt (Seedance takes a single prompt — global look must live in each).
Show-don't-tell acting: 'jaw tightens, swallows once' not 'looks sad'.
Every camera move motivated; design each prompt to fill all 15 seconds, no dead air.
Continuity tracker / character anchors are NOT a visible block — surface them as concrete language inside Characters and CUT lines.
Prompt text always English; dialogue原文 inside CUT quotes, marked 'says in {language}'.
NO HTML output — the artifact is the video_generator node prompt string.
reference_images_to_attach: Storyboard table image (Stage 4 output) for this part — provides shot composition reference
voice_references_to_attach: For each character in speaking_characters: their voice_reference_url

allowed_values: Extreme wide shot (EWS) — 極遠景 — 建立場景規模
Wide shot (WS) — 遠景 — 顯示完整環境與角色
Medium shot (MS) — 中景 — 角色互動,腰部以上
Close-up (CU) — 特寫 — 表情與情緒
Extreme close-up (ECU) — 大特寫 — 細節(眼、手)
Over-the-shoulder shot (OTS) — 過肩鏡頭 — 對話

good_examples: Handheld slight shake following the action
Fast tracking shot moving with character_b
Slow pan right across the scene

lighting.description: 光源 + 方向 + 顏色溫度 + 強度 + 氣氛
good_examples: 冷藍色背光穿過濃霧,右側有微弱橘色火光
紅色警示燈從上方閃爍,角色臉部一半在陰影中

audio.description: 環境音 + 音效 + 音樂(對白獨立放 dialogue)
good_examples: 低沉風聲、遠方雷聲、微弱低頻音樂
金屬摩擦聲、急促心跳聲

dialogue.description: 對白原文,搭配 dialogue_speaker 指明說話者 ID
dialogue.voice_routing: Stage 5 依 dialogue_speaker 找到該角色的 voice_reference_url

floor_plan_note.description: 環境的平面圖文字描述,Stage 3 環境圖會生成俯視平面圖
good_examples: T 字形巷弄,主巷東西向約 20m,北側支巷 8m,巷口有店家招牌
方形房間 4x5m,床靠西牆,窗在北牆,門在東牆,書桌在南牆下

consistency_rules_global: Same face across all parts — match character total reference
Same costume unless story explicitly changes
Same environment lighting style and spatial layout — match env reference (含 floor plan)
Same color tone within same environment
Same voice — voice reference URL persists across all parts where character speaks
No redesign of any visual element after Stage 3 confirmation

parallel_generation_workflow.stage_3: Build all image nodes first, call run_image_generator on each without waiting. Display each image immediately when complete. Allow re-generation of individual nodes by ID. Wait for explicit '全部確認' before Stage 4.
parallel_generation_workflow.stage_4: Same parallel pattern — all storyboard nodes start simultaneously. Wait for '全部確認' before Stage 5.
parallel_generation_workflow.stage_5_videos: After user says '開始生成', call run_video_generator on all video_part_X simultaneously. Display each as it completes. Only after ALL video_parts complete, run combine. Final output = combined video + full file inventory.
